Article Title: How Gautam Gambhir helped India tame T20’s fickle nature: Firm ideas, flexible tactics
Article Text:
Sanju Samson being congratulated by head coach Gautam Gambhir. (PTI Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

T20 World Cup final: Fans in Ahmedabad go wild | India create history

Poll Is Gautam Gambhir's approach to T20 cricket effective in developing young talent? Absolutely Effective Somewhat Effective

ALSO READ:

“We are a gun team.” These were Gautam Gambhir ’s first words to a young and inexperienced Test team under greenhorn captain Shubman Gill in England last summer. That one sentence killed doubts in the dressing room as the team went on to tie the fiveTest series 2-2.Barring the high in England, Gambhir’s Test record as head coach has been abysmal. This T20 World Cup win, however, is another reminder that he has owned the T20 format since he took charge in July 2024. His past experience in franchise cricket and his power of conviction keeps him and his team a step ahead of everybody else in this format.That India are now the undisputed power centre of T20 cricket has much to do with the proliferation of the IPL.Gambhir the coach too is a product of the IPL. Two strong seasons with Lucknow Super Giants, followed by a title-winning season with Kolkata Knight Riders, sprung him to the Team India post vacated by Rahul Dravid.‘Transition’ was the buzzword when he took over. For Gambhir, though, it was never about forming a concrete template. He didn’t mind making wholesome changes to the T20 team which had just lifted a trophy in Barbados.His approach may seem regimented at the outset but he always leaves enough room for taking calls on the fly.Gambhir, unfailingly, invokes the “playing-for-140 crore-Indians” rhetoric in his media briefings. Form over reputation has been the underlining principle. Captain Suryakumar Yadav has been the sole exemption because Gambhir believes in having a person leading the team on the field who aligns with his thought process.Gambhir’s calls have often bordered on the whimsical. He wears his non-populist decisions like a crest. But then, that’s what the fickle nature of T20 demands. In hindsight, one may argue he is too consumed by this process. It works spectacularly well in T20s but may prevent him from maintaining the continuity demanded by the longer formats.Whether India need to split the thinktank across formats is still a debate but Gambhir has made his displeasure known about the suggestion. He is a proud nonconformist. He got the selectors to align with his ideas. Ignoring the likes of Shubman Gill, Rishabh Pant and Shreyas Iyer, the biggest young brands of Indian cricket, have been coldblooded calls. Gambhir has always maintained that T20 cricket is a different sport, demanding unique skills.Indian cricket didn’t seem to be ready for such a cultural shift at the start of his regime. Now, it has embraced the change. Sources close to the team management say Sanju Samson was given a strong message about the bad habits that had crept into his game just before the T20 World Cup. As Ishan Kishan bloomed at the top of the order, Gambhir worked overtime with Samson to eliminate the exaggerated shuffle deep in the crease and stabilise the batter’s stance.The lone blunder came when he sacrificed vice-captain Axar Patel for an undercooked Washington Sundar during the Super-8 defeat to South Africa.Now that he has delivered in his strongest format as a tactician, it will be interesting to see how he reboots when the focus shifts to the ODI World Cup in 2027 and World Test Championship. Will he be flexible enough to plan for the longer formats?
Article Summary: Gautam Gambhir has owned the T20 format since he took charge in July 2024. His past experience in franchise cricket and his power of conviction keeps him and his team a step ahead of everybody else in this format. India are now the undisputed power centre of T20 cricket.

Article Title: Indian National Cricket Team: Key inflection points for Team India from 2024–26
Article Text:
Axar Patel and Suryakumar Yadav celebrate the wicket of New Zealand's Glenn Phillips. (ANI Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

MOVING ON FROM HARDIK PANDYA AS CAPTAINCY OPTION

T20 World Cup final: Fans in Ahmedabad go wild | India create history

APPOINTING SURYAKUMAR AS T20-ONLY CAPTAIN

Poll Do you agree with India's decision to drop Shubman Gill for a more aggressive approach? Yes, it's a great strategic move. No, Gill should have been retained.

DROPPING SHUBMAN GILL FOR

INTENT-BASED SELECTION

BACKING SANJU SAMSON AS ROHIT’S REPLACEMENT

MAINTAINING LEFT-RIGHT BATTING COMBINATIONS

BACKING SPECIALIST FINISHERS

INCLUDING MULTIPLE ALLROUNDERS

After breaking a decade-long title drought with the 2024 T20 World Cup win, India went all in with a modern, aggressive T20 identity. After veterans like Rohit Sharma Virat Kohli and Ravindra Jadeja stepped away, the think-tank designed a younger, braver side in which roles rather than reputations held sway. The subsequent two-year stretch was marked by inflection points in leadership, selection and tactics. TOI decodes what went into India’s transition from a powerhouse of individuals to a relentless T20-winning machine...Hardik Pandya was long considered the heir apparent to the T20 throne but the shift away from his leadership was a strategic pivot towards stability.One, his fitness was dodgy. Secondly, freeing him up from captaincy duties allowed him to grow into the role of the side’s primary allrounder. This allowed India’s most valuable allround asset to stay physically and mentally fresh for high pressure situations.Handing the T20 captaincy to Suryakumar Yadav, a one-format player, was a bold strategic move. It marked a clear shift toward format specialisation, ensuring leadership continuity in the shortest format.Known for his fearless batting and innovative mindset, Surya embodied the modern T20 philosophy India wanted to adopt. His leadership emphasised intent, aggressive Powerplay batting and tactical flexibility with bowling changes. With his appointment, India created a structure where decisions were driven purely by T20 demands.Shubman Gill’s exclusion was perhaps the loudest statement of the new era. Despite his technical brilliance and ODI dominance, his ‘classical’ approach was deemed too conservative. The management prioritised strike-rates over averages. By moving on from Gill, India sent a clear message that pedigree alone wouldn’t guarantee a spot. This paved the way for a more explosive, though volatile, top order in the form of Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson and Ishan Kishan.Replacing a titan like Rohit Sharma was no small feat but Sanju Samson’s like-for-like elevation worked wonders. While initially facing familiar ‘inconsistency’ labels, the batter delivered just when it mattered most, justifying the management’s decision to stick by him through the lean patches. Reintroducing him as a primary aggressor during the World Cup provided India with a ’keeperbatter who could exploit the Powerplay better than most. His ability to hit good balls for boundaries changed the team’s offensive baseline, turning him from a backup option into the indispensable tactical heartbeat.One of the tactical commitments from India was to maintain the leftright combinations throughout the batting order. Pairings such as Abhishek Sharma with Sanju Samson at the top, followed by Ishan Kishan and Suryakumar Yadav ensured bowlers rarely settled into rhythm. Later partnerships involving Shivam Dube and Hardik Pandya continued the pattern. The constant change of angles disrupted field placements and bowling plans. By structuring the lineup around alternating batting hands, India added a tactical layer that increased scoring opportunities and forced opponents to continuously adjust match-ups.India placed greater emphasis on specialist finishers rather than relying solely on top-order dominance. Players like Shivam Dube and Rinku Singh were groomed for clearly defined late overs roles. Their job was not to anchor the innings but to maximise scoring in the final five overs against pace and spin alike. This shift recognised a key modern T20 reality that games are often decided in the final phase.Allrounders became central to the squad composition, providing flexibility in both batting depth and bowling options. Players like Hardik Pandya, Shivam Dube, Axar Patel and Washington Sundar allowed India to extend the batting lineup without compromising bowling resources. This multi-skilled approach made tactical adjustments easier, particularly on different pitches and conditions. It also helped captain Suryakumar to react dynamically to match situations, ensuring that the side maintained balance even while fielding aggressive batting combinations.
Article Summary: India broke a decade-long title drought with the 2024 T20 World Cup win. After veterans like Rohit Sharma Virat Kohli and Ravindra Jadeja stepped away, the think-tank designed a younger, braver side in which roles rather than reputations held sway. TOI decodes what went into India’s transition from a powerhouse of individuals to a relentless T20-winning machine.

Article Title: Why Gautam Gambhir dedicated India’s win to Rahul Dravid and VVS Laxman
Article Text: T20 World Cup: Why Gautam Gambhir dedicated India’s win to Rahul Dravid and VVS Laxman
Article Summary: Gautam Gambhir dedicated India’s win to Rahul Dravid and VVS Laxman. India beat Australia by eight wickets to win the T20 World Cup. India won the tournament for the first time in their history.

Article Title: Anil Kumble: Sanju Samson is a combination of Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma
Article Text:
Sanju Samson (PTI Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

India’s T20 World Cup win sparks celebrations | Rajeev Shukla, Tharoor & others react

ALSO READ:

NEW DELHI: When Sanju Samson walked out to open midway through the tournament, few could have predicted that he would end up scripting one of the most remarkable turnarounds in ICC Men's T20 World Cup history. But for India spin legend Anil Kumble , Samson’s performances in the knockout stages reflected a rare blend of two of India’s greatest modern batters — Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma .After spending the first half of the tournament on the bench, Samson was drafted into the XI as an opener ahead of the decisive Super 8 clash against the West Indies. The Kerala batter responded with an unbeaten 97 in what was effectively a virtual knockout in Kolkata, before producing back-to-back 89s in the semi-final and the final to power India’s title-winning run.The explosive streak saw Samson break several records, including the highest individual score in a T20 World Cup final. He also joined Kohli as the only Indians to score fifties in both the semi-final and final of the same World Cup edition, while finishing with a staggering 321 runs in just five innings — the most by an Indian in a single edition of the tournament.For Kumble, the numbers told only part of the story.“If you look at the previous World Cup in 2024, it had Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma.Both are great players, very difficult to replace them,” Kumble said on ESPNcricinfo. “I think Samson is a combination of Kohli and Rohit, in a sense.”Kumble explained that Samson displayed Kohli’s calculated control when the situation demanded patience, while also unleashing Rohit-like aggression when the momentum needed to shift.“When it required a little bit of Kohli, where you just plan and ensure that you don’t lose wickets,” he said. “And then whenever you need to accelerate in the powerplay, you want to take on the bowlers — like Rohit.”Even while anchoring the innings, Samson did not compromise on his natural flair. As India became the first team to smash 100 sixes in a single World Cup edition, Samson accounted for 24 of them — the most by any batter in the tournament.
Article Summary: Anil Kumble believes Sanju Samson is a combination of Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma. The Kerala batter scored 321 runs in five innings during the tournament. India became the first team to smash 100 sixes in a single World Cup edition.

Article Title: Iran sing national anthem before bowing out of Women's Asian Cup
Article Text:
Iran players react during their national anthem ahead of the Women's Asian Cup soccer match between Iran and the Philippines in Robina, Australia, Sunday, March 8, 2026. (AP)

Exclusive: Aymeric Laporte previews Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona | La Liga

GOLD COAST: Iran's players sang the national anthem and saluted before bowing out of the Women's Asian Cup with defeat in their last group match on Sunday in Australia.When Iran faced South Korea on Monday in their opening game the players stood motionless, two days after the US and Israel began a war against the country.But on Thursday in their second game, against hosts Australia, all the Iranian players saluted and sang the anthem on the Gold Coast.Against the Philippines on Sunday they again sang and saluted as the rain came down on Queensland's Gold Coast.They went on to lose the encounter 2-0, ending their hopes of reaching the next round.No public reason was given for the players' original stance over the pre-game national anthem.Coach Marziyeh Jafari has said her team have "so much concern" about their families as the conflict raged and that players felt "fully disconnected" from their loved ones.Speaking to national broadcaster ABC ahead of Sunday's game, Foreign Minister Penny Wong was asked about the prospect of the team going home."I want to say about the Iranian women's team that it has been really moving for Australians to see them in Australia," she said.Wong added that the sight of the Australian players swapping shirts with their Iranian opponents was "a very evocative moment"."It spoke to solidarity and the way in which sport can bring us together," she said."We know this regime has brutally oppressed many Iranian women," she added.Iran lost 3-0 to South Korea and 4-0 to Australia to finish bottom of Group A with nine goals conceded and none scored.
Article Summary: Iran's players stood motionless during the national anthem in their opening game against South Korea. But on Thursday in their second game, against hosts Australia, all the Iranian players saluted and sang the anthem. On Sunday they again sang and saluted as the rain came down on Queensland's Gold Coast. They went on to lose the encounter 2-0 and finish bottom of Group A.

Article Title: La Liga: Lamine Yamal and Nicolas Gonzalez shine as Barcelona and Atletico win
Article Text:
Lamine Yamal of FC Barcelona celebrates after scoring (Getty Images)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Poll Did you think Athletic Bilbao deserved to win the match against Barcelona? Yes, they played better No, Barcelona earned the win

Atletico edge Sociedad

Teenage star Lamine Yamal scored a brilliant goal to help FC Barcelona beat Athletic Bilbao 1-0 in La Liga on Saturday.The win allowed Barcelona to restore their four-point lead over Real Madrid, who had earlier beaten Celta Vigo on Friday.The match at San Mames Stadium was closely contested and had few clear chances. Barcelona coach Hansi Flick rotated his squad because the team will soon face Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League round of 16.Barcelona struggled in the first half and did not create many chances.Midfielder Pedri later praised Yamal’s talent."We're already seeing what Lamine can do -- he puts it right in the top corner and there's nothing the keeper can do," Barca midfielder Pedri told Movistar."He's very young and he's only going to get better."What he has to do is not settle, to keep going like this, keep working and enjoying himself out there on the pitch, because he gives us a lot."Athletic Bilbao had some opportunities before the break. Selton Sanchez ran through on goal but Barcelona goalkeeper Joan Garcia made a good stop. The home team also thought they had scored, but Inaki Williams was ruled offside.Both teams appealed for red cards in the second half after fouls involving Alejandro Rego, Dani Olmo, and Pau Cubarsi, but the referee only showed yellow cards.Barcelona finally found the breakthrough in the 68th minute. Substitute Pedri passed the ball to Yamal, who escaped the attention of defender Adama Boiro and curled a beautiful shot into the top corner. It was his 19th goal of the season in all competitions.The goal proved to be the decisive moment in a tight match, giving Barcelona all three points.Athletic defender Dani Vivian said his team felt unlucky, believing they played well but did not deserve to lose."It's a very bad feeling, I think we were better, we didn't deserve to lose," said Athletic defender Dani Vivian."Today was a tough day against the hardest team in the league, and we saw how (well) the team did, it's a shame we didn't get the win."Nicolas Gonzalez scored twice as Atletico Madrid defeated Real Sociedad, moving three points clear of fourth-placed Villarreal in La Liga.Both teams had already qualified for the Copa del Rey final earlier in the week, so this match served as a preview of their title clash in Seville in April.Atletico took the lead through Alexander Sorloth, who continued his good scoring form. However, Carlos Soler equalised for Real Sociedad before halftime.In the second half, substitute Antoine Griezmann helped Atletico regain the lead by setting up Gonzalez with a clever backheel pass. But Real Sociedad quickly responded, with Mikel Oyarzabal scoring from outside the penalty area.The winning goal came when Gonzalez jumped high to head in a cross from Matteo Ruggieri."It had been a while since I'd scored so it's good I could do it today in this stadium with these fans," Gonzalez told Movistar."We're showing in every game what we want and what we're capable of."Atletico coach Diego Simeone praised Gonzalez, who had struggled for form after an injury in December."I'm really happy for Nico... he got injured in December and hasn't been able to find his form since," said Simeone."I hope he keeps it up, because we need everything he has to offer."Real Sociedad coach Pellegrino Matarazzo admitted his team did not play their best but believes things could be different when the two sides meet again in the Copa del Rey final in six weeks."We hate to lose and the performance was not our best," said Matarazzo."There's six weeks (before the final) with different players on the pitch... things will be different."
Article Summary: FC Barcelona beat Athletic Bilbao 1-0 in La Liga on Saturday. Lamine Yamal scored the only goal of the match in the 68th minute. Nicolas Gonzalez scored twice as Atletico Madrid beat Real Sociedad. Atletico move three points clear of fourth-placed Villarreal in the table.

Article Title: FA Cup: Arsenal, Manchester City, Chelsea and Liverpool make quarterfinals
Article Text:
Arsenal (AP Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Premier League leaders Arsenal had to battle hard to reach the quarterfinals of the FA Cup, edging Mansfield Town 2-1 away in a close match.Mansfield, who had knocked out Burnley in the previous round, defended well early on. But Noni Madueke broke the deadlock after 40 minutes with a neat left-footed finish.The home side fought back after the break. Substitute Will Evans equalised in the 50th minute when he ran onto a loose ball and scored. Mansfield stayed competitive until substitute Eberechi Eze struck a powerful shot into the roof of the net to secure Arsenal’s victory.Meanwhile, Manchester City also moved into the last eight with a 3-1 comeback win away to Newcastle United.Harvey Barnes gave Newcastle the lead in the 18th minute. City responded when Savinho equalised before halftime. Omar Marmoush then scored twice in the second half — first from close range and later with a powerful strike from outside the penalty area — to seal the win.Chelsea had a difficult match against Championship side Wrexham, eventually winning 4-2 after extra time.Sam Smith put Wrexham ahead in the 18th minute, but Chelsea levelled just before halftime thanks to an own goal by goalkeeper Arthur Okonkwo.Callum Doyle restored Wrexham’s lead in the 79th minute, but Josh Acheampong quickly equalised.Wrexham’s hopes suffered a blow when George Dobson was sent off. In extra time, Alejandro Garnacho put Chelsea ahead, and Joao Pedro scored late to confirm the win.Earlier, Liverpool became the first team to reach the quarterfinals with a 3-1 victory away to Wolverhampton Wanderers. The result also helped Liverpool avenge a 2-1 league defeat at the same venue earlier in the week.
Article Summary: Arsenal beat Mansfield Town 2-1 to reach the quarterfinals of the FA Cup. Manchester City also moved into the last eight with a 3-1 comeback win away to Newcastle United. Chelsea had a difficult match against Championship side Wrexham, eventually winning 4-2 after extra time.

Article Title: 'We will take this game as a final' - Aymeric Laporte on Barcelona clash in La Liga
Article Text:
File photo of Athletic Bilbao defender Aymeric Laporte with Barcelona's Dani Olmo during a La Liga match. (AP)

New Delhi:

Exclusive: Aymeric Laporte previews Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona | La Liga

Excerpts:

Q.

Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona

is a big game. How has the preparation been like? What are some of the areas you're focussing on as a team?

Laporte:

Q. You will be starting in defence. Against a team like Barcelona, what is the biggest challenge - one on ones, defensive line, what is it?

Laporte:

File photo of fans of Athletic Club at Estadio de San Mames. (Getty Images)

Q. Coming to Athletic, things have been a bit up and down this year. What is the goal for the team overall?

Laporte:

Q. With the World Cup also coming later in the year. For you personally, is there any goal fitness-wise or game-wise that you are looking to improve or build on as a player?

Laporte:

WATCH: Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona will be LIVE at 1:30am IST on 8 March on FanCode.

Athletic Bilbao face a daunting challenge as they host La Liga leaders Barcelona at San Mames, with the Catalan giants narrowly ahead in the title race.While Barcelona are battling Real Madrid at the top, ninth-placed Athletic are chasing European places in a tightly packed mid-table. For Aymeric Laporte, who spoke exclusively to TimesofIndia.com, the clash represents both a tactical test and a statement opportunity for Ernesto Valverde’s side.The defender expects Athletic to spend long spells without the ball against Barcelona’s possession-heavy style but insists the team is preparing to treat the match “like a final”. Laporte also spoke about the Basque side's season objectives and his personal focus with Spain’s World Cup campaign looming.Barcelona is a big team. They play top gameplay, so they have a good style - possession ball, long time. We will have to run for sure, but I hope we will be preparing at San Mames to do something big.Yeah, it's always a big challenge against big teams like this.We try our best, I try my best also. I try to manage the line, the defensive line, the pitch.It's true that we are rotating, like we are playing different people nearly every single game. But yeah, we are trying to solve all the issues game by game and we will try to prepare this game as a final.The ambition is to go game-by-game. I think it's the most important thing for this season.I would like or love to say in that top-six. But right now we are not in the best position to talk about the first 6-7 of La Liga. Step by step, Barcelona first and after we will see if we can win many games. We will try our best to win as much as possible and try to find the places on top of the league.When you play for a team in La Liga and I have played for Spain for a few years, of course it is in my head. It is also why I've come back here to Spain. To play the big games during the season, to keep the rhythm, the highest level. First we have the Finalissima against Argentina and after we will think about the World Cup.
Article Summary: Athletic Bilbao host La Liga leaders Barcelona at San Mames on 8 March. Barcelona are narrowly ahead in the title race, with Real Madrid second. Laporte expects Athletic to spend long spells without the ball against Barcelona’s possession-heavy style.

Article Title: ISL: Jamie Maclaren nets four, Mohun Bagan hammer Odisha 5-1 at Salt Lake
Article Text:
Jamie Maclaren (PTI Photo/Swapan Mahapatra)

ISL Highlights: Mohun Bagan Super Giants vs Odisha FC

KOLKATA: Jamie Maclaren smashed four goals — including a first-half hat-trick — as Mohun Bagan SG hammered Odisha FC 5-1 at the Salt Lake Stadium on Friday to stay perfect in their ISL campaign.The in-form Maclaren started the demolition job for Sergio Lobera’s defending champions and league leaders against the Spanish coach’s former team with two quick goals in 14 and 24 minutes. Alberto Rodrigues then came up from his defence to make it 3-0 with a piledriver from 25 yards out in the 42nd minute.Although Rahim Ali reduced the margin for the visitors within a minute, cashing in on a rare miscommunication between Bagan defender Mehtab Singh and goalkeeper Vishal Kaith, Maclaren still had time enough to complete his hattrick in the first minute of the first-half injury time and kill the game as a contest.The Australian striker then completed the rout with his fourth goal in the 88th minute as Lobera’s marauding side made it four wins in as many matches to lead the standings.In doing so, Maclaren — who has now scored in all four matches — also moved to the top of the scoring chart in this truncated ISL with 7 goals.
Article Summary: Jamie Maclaren scores hat-trick as Mohun Bagan SG thrash Odisha FC 5-1. Australian striker moves to the top of the scoring chart in this truncated ISL. Sergio Lobera’s side make it four wins in as many matches to lead the standings.

Article Title: Federico Valverde's stoppage-time strike gives Real Madrid 2-1 win over Celta Vigo
Article Text:
Real Madrid's Federico Valverde. (AP Photo/Lalo R. Villar)

Hard-fought win

Federico Valverde's heavily deflected 95th-minute drive snatched injury-hit Real Madrid a 2-1 win at Celta Vigo in La Liga on Friday.The Uruguayan midfielder needed a stroke of fortune at the death to pull his team to within one point of leaders Barcelona, who visit Athletic Bilbao on Saturday.Aurelien Tchouameni opened the scoring for Los Blancos early on but Borja Iglesias soon pulled Celta level at their Balaidos stadium.Alvaro Arbeloa's Madrid, without injured striker Kylian Mbappe , had lost their previous two league games and are struggling to find consistent form.Valverde's shot, which flew into Celta's net after bouncing off former Barcelona defender Marcos Alonso, stopped his side going three consecutive La Liga matches without a win."There's a long way to go in La Liga, a lot of points left to play for... at this point it's almost like La Liga has not started yet," Arbeloa told reporters."Every game you're playing against a team that has their own objectives and each game will be a war."We came here with 10 players out so I think our win deserves a lot of credit."As well as French superstar Mbappe, the team's top goalscorer, Arbeloa was without several other players including Jude Bellingham, Rodrygo Goes and Eduardo Camavinga.Despite the victory, Madrid's form and their injury list does not inspire confidence ahead of next week's Champions League last 16 clash against Manchester City.Arbeloa started 18-year-old midfielder Thiago Pitarch for the first time and he offered a decent display even as his team failed to impress.Iglesias forced Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois into a solid low save with a drive from the edge of the box in the opening exchanges.Arbeloa's side started well and Vinicius Junior struck the post before Tchouameni put them ahead in the 11th minute.The French midfielder produced a fine finish from the edge of the box as Madrid worked a corner to him, his strike hitting the upright on its way in.Celta were not discouraged though and some poor defending from Trent Alexander-Arnold let them back in.The England international allowed Williot Swedberg to get in behind him and then lacked the agility to block off the Swede, who cut the ball across for Iglesias to finish.Courtois made a good save to keep Swedberg at bay before the break, as sixth-place Celta largely gave as good as they got.Madrid appealed for a penalty when Ferran Jutgla handled the ball in the box, but a VAR review showed there was a push on a Celta defender just before and no spot kick was awarded.Celta substitute Iago Aspas hit the post late on and it seemed like his team were destined for a point as the clock ticked down.However in the final minute of stoppage time Valverde's effort from the edge of the box hit Alonso and left Celta goalkeeper Ionut Radu wrong-footed."We hardly gave up any chances, and the shot at the end was well defended, so we're a bit annoyed (to lose)," Iglesias told Movistar.Arbeloa said he hoped Madrid's determination to claim the three points could be a platform to build from going forward."I know we can do a lot of things better, but with the personality and character we showed today, I hope that this is a turning point and from here everything goes a lot better," added Arbeloa.
Article Summary: Real Madrid beat Celta Vigo 2-1 in La Liga on Friday. Federico Valverde's 95th- minute goal gives Los Blancos victory. Aurelien Tchouameni opened the scoring for Madrid. Borja Iglesias equalized for sixth-place Celta.

Article Title: FA Cup: 17-year-old winger Rio Ngumoh impresses as Liverpool crush Wolves 3-1 to enter quarterfinals
Article Text:
Liverpool's Rio Ngumoha. (AP Photo/Dave Shopland)

Ngumoha stands out

Liverpool moved into the FA Cup quarter-finals with a 3-1 win against Wolves on Friday as the Reds avenged their painful Premier League loss at Molineux just 72 hours earlier.Arne Slot's side struck twice in quick succession in the second half through Andrew Robertson's long-range rocket and a predatory Mohamed Salah finish.Curtis Jones wrapped up a much-needed fifth-round victory for Liverpool after their embarrassing 2-1 defeat against the Premier League's bottom club three days earlier.Hwang Hee-chan's late reply was no consolation for Wolves.Branded "slow and predictable" by furious captain Virgil van Dijk following that calamity, Liverpool set the record straight on their return to the West Midlands.Despite spending £450 million ($599 million) on new signings in the close season, Liverpool have mounted a woeful title defence, leaving the FA Cup and the Champions League as their last chances for silverware.Languishing in sixth place in the Premier League -- 19 points behind leaders Arsenal -- Slot needs to deliver a trophy to ease the mounting pressure in his turbulent second season at Anfield.Liverpool remain in contention for a ninth FA Cup triumph, and a first since 2022, while they step up their Champions League challenge with a last 16 first leg trip to Galatasaray on Tuesday.Slot made four changes for the Wolves rematch, including three in defence as Jeremie Frimpong, Milos Kerkez and Ibrahima Konate were all dropped.Avoiding relegation remains unlikely for a team currently 12 points from safety, but as well as beating Liverpool, Wolves also recently drew with Premier League leaders Arsenal and defeated Aston Villa.Well aware of their impending fate, Wolves fans mocked Liverpool with chants of "2-1 to the Championship" in the first half.Liverpool's 17-year-old winger Rio Ngumoha nearly silenced the taunts with a low drive that forced a good save from Sam Johnstone.Ngumoha carried Liverpool's lone threat in the opening period, his goal-bound strike headed clear by Joao Gomes after an incisive raid.Despite Ngumoha's best efforts, it was another uninspired half from Liverpool in a season scarred by criticism of their prosaic approach.Slot's men finally conjured a rare moment of magic to break the deadlock in the 51st minute.Salah and Jones worked the ball to Robertson and he thundered a superb strike into the far corner from 20 yards.It was the Scotland left-back's second goal this season and his first since September.After scoring against Wolves on Tuesday, Salah was back on target to double the lead two minutes later.When Salah pounced on Robertson's cross with a close-range finish, the Egyptian's ninth goal this season was initially disallowed for offside before VAR overturned the decision.Adding to the good news for Slot, German playmaker Florian Wirtz came off the bench in the closing stages after missing three games with a back injury.Jones put the seal on Liverpool's fifth win in their last six matches, caressing his shot past Johnstone in the 74th minute.Liverpool switched off in stoppage time as Hwang ran onto Johnstone's long punt to slot past Alisson Becker.
Article Summary: Liverpool beat Wolves 3-1 in the FA Cup fifth round. Andrew Robertson, Mohamed Salah and Curtis Jones on target for Reds. Liverpool avenged 2-1 Premier League defeat at Molineux on Tuesday. Wolves fans mocked Liverpool with chants of "2-1 to the Championship" in first half.

Article Title: Nazi salute costs Real Madrid as UEFA slaps $17,000 fine after fan's gesture during Champions League game
Article Text:
Real Madrid's Vinicius Junior reacts during a Spanish La Liga football match between Real Madrid and Getafe in Madrid, Spain, Monday, March 2, 2026. (AP Photo)

UEFA has fined Spanish football club Real Madrid 15,000 euros ($17,000) after one of the club’s supporters made a Nazi salute before a recent UEFA Champions League match against Benfica. The governing body also imposed a partial stadium closure of 500 seats at the Santiago Bernabéu, suspended for one year.UEFA said the action was taken after an incident before the second leg of the play-off round between the two sides on February 25. The disciplinary board punished Madrid "for the racist and/or discriminatory behaviour of its supporters," according to a statement issued by the European football body.The incident took place before Real Madrid’s Champions League match against Benfica. The Spanish club later said the supporter involved had been identified and removed from the stadium."Real Madrid condemns this type of gesture and expression that incites violence and hatred in sports and society," the club said at the time.A week before the incident at the Bernabéu, Madrid forward Vinícius Júnior alleged that he was racially abused by Benfica player Gianluca Prestianni. Prestianni has denied the allegation.Real Madrid also removed the supporter who was caught on camera making the Nazi salute before the match began. The first leg of the tie had also seen the alleged racism incident involving Vinicius and Prestianni.Real Madrid advanced to the round of 16 of the Champions League, where they will face Manchester City.
Article Summary: UEFA has fined Spanish football club Real Madrid 15,000 euros ($17,000) after one of the club's supporters made a Nazi salute. The governing body also imposed a partial stadium closure of 500 seats at the Santiago Bernabéu, suspended for one year. The incident took place before Real Madrid’s Champions League match against Benfica.

Article Title: Chennaiyin FC to take on Kerala Blasters on Saturday
Article Text:
While Chennaiyin managed to salvage a point in their last outing against Odisha FC, the Blasters have endured a difficult start, losing all three of their opening matches.

ISL Highlights: Kerala Blasters FC vs Mumbai City FC

CHENNAI: Chennaiyin FC (CFC) will take on Kerala Blasters (KBFC) in the much-anticipated southern derby in Kochi on Saturday, with both teams still searching for their first win of the season. While Chennaiyin managed to salvage a point in their last outing against Odisha FC, the Blasters have endured a difficult start, losing all three of their opening matches. Ahead of the clash, CFC head coach Clifford Miranda said he expects more from both his foreign signings and senior Indian players as the team looks to turn performances into results.“We have 28 players, but foreigners do play a big part. That’s the truth because they bring quality, leadership, charisma and character.Not that Indian players don’t have these qualities, but foreign players help to further bolster the team,” Miranda said.“I expect more from our foreign players and also from some of the senior Indian players in the team. In terms of work rate and understanding the game, I demand more from everyone. When I pick the team, I don’t look at nationality or where a player comes from. I just choose the players who can give the best for the team on that particular day.”Chennaiyin have scored just once in their opening three matches despite creating opportunities. Miranda believes the issue lies in the final third.“It’s a combination of both decision-making and execution. The final phase is always the most difficult because you get very little time and space,” he said.“We are doing quite well in the first two phases of the game, but in the final phase we need more composure. We also need more players arriving in the penalty box. Possession is important, but in the end it’s goals that win matches.”Despite Kerala’s winless start, Miranda expects a stern challenge at the Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium.“If you look at their games, they have played well and were a little unlucky not to get something from those matches. Playing in Kochi is never easy for any team. It’s going to be a very difficult game,” he said.
Article Summary: Chennaiyin FC (CFC) will take on Kerala Blasters (KBFC) in the much-anticipated southern derby in Kochi on Saturday. Both teams are still searching for their first win of the season. While Chennaiyin managed to salvage a point in their last outing against Odisha FC, the Blasters have endured a difficult start, losing all three of their opening matches.

Article Title: Spain, France favourites, but you never know with Germany: Benedikt Howedes
Article Text:
Benedikt Howedes. (Photo by David S Bustamante/Soccrates/Getty Images)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

NEW DELHI: Howedes is an unsung hero even in Germany and he likes it that way. One who played every minute in Germany’s famous World Cup triumph in 2014, Howedes prefers to stay under the radar even after a decade.Not quite possible though for those who were fortunate to watch him keep Argentina’s right flank rather quiet at the Maracana in that 2014 final. He could have been the toast of the world just before half-time when his thunderous header came to grief off the Argentina post from a Toni Kroos corner.“Of course, I remember that situation. But you won’t believe me, but I’m not unhappy with it because I’ve seen what happened afterwards with Mario Goetze (who scored the lone goal that day) and I’m not that guy who wants to be in the spotlight.Nowadays I can say I played every single minute,” he tells TOI in an exclusive interaction.“I want to work and I can go through the city without being recognized by everyone and that makes it quite comfortable for me, to be honest,” says the German defender who has traded raucous fame for normalcy and reliability, a necessary state of mind for a multi-functional defender.“Especially now, when I have three kids at home and it’s easier for my kids to get a normal life.Instead of just being the kid of Mr. Howedes who starred in the World Cup final,” he points out.“I was a different type when I played football. I’m always a team player. One of my strengths is that I can easily adapt to different positions on the pitch. I always put the team in front of my personal situation. So I’ll put all the effort in the team,” says the Schalke 04 legend.With the World Cup 2026 less than 100 days to kick-off, Howedes shares his assessment of the German national team under Julian Nagelsmann. “I think the German team always had a strength in terms of mentality and we create a special spirit during a tournament. The last tournament, we were different. We didn’t have many good players in the last few years.“That has changed a little bit now,” he adds, “We have (Jamal) Musiala and (Florian) Wirtz, (Nico) Schlotterbeck and (Joshua) Kimmich, who are playing an outstanding role in the national team. In my opinion, we are not the top favourites for winning the World Cup. For me it’s Spain or France. But you never know what happens during a tournament when you are creating something really special. If they can create this special team spirit, then everything is possible. ”Recalling that unforgettable 7-1 win over hosts Brazil, Howedes revealed the dressing-room atmosphere during the break when Germany were 5-0 ahead. “To be honest it was not that we were going crazy and everybody was laughing and shouting and celebrating,” he reminds us.“It was totally the opposite because we knew that one year or so before that game we had a World Cup qualifier against Sweden. We were leading 4-0 until the 60th min and after the final whistle, it was a 4-4 draw. We had this in our mind and we had to stay focused. We didn’t want to make jokes with the Brazil players. We played very straight and we scored two more goals in the second session,” he says.(SONY SPORTS NETWORK IS THE OFFICIAL BROADCASTER OF BUNDESLIGA IN INDIA)
Article Summary: Benedikt Howedes is an unsung hero even in Germany and he likes it that way. The defender played every minute in Germany’s famous World Cup triumph in 2014. Howedes shares his assessment of the German national team under Julian Nagelsmann.

Article Title: Cj Gardner Contract: C.J. Gardner-Johnson drops mysterious message as Chicago Bears' future comes into question
Article Text:
C.J. Gardner-Johnson drops mysterious message as Chicago Bears' future comes into question(Image via Getty)

Cryptic post raises questions about CJ Gardner-Johnson's future with the Chicago Bears



Free agency chatter around C. J. Gardner-Johnson heated up after the Chicago Bears safety posted a cryptic message on X. His short line quickly caught attention across the league. With the NFL free agency window approaching, fans and insiders started reading between the lines about ‌Gardner's future in Chicago.The post arrived months after CJ Gardner joined the Bears during the 2025 season. The veteran safety produced solid numbers in a limited time. However, the tone of his message sparked fresh speculation that his stay in Chicago may not last long.Gardner-Johnson posted the message on X, writing: “One thing about me I vouch for every single player I played with, wish the love was mutual! But God vouched for me, so I'm blessed.”The comment landed at a sensitive time. NFL teams sit just days away from the start of free agency negotiations. Naturally, the post triggered debate about CJ Gardner's future and whether the Chicago Bears plan to bring him back.His teammate, Jaquan Brisker, responded quickly. Brisker replied to X within about 20 minutes and told him, "You always got love this way! Go be greater.” That brief response only added more intrigue to the situation.Some fans anticipated his Eagles return and wrote, "You know you're comin' back to Philly, right?" Another added, "Come back to Philly, please." Another person said, "It's for the new team."Gardner-Johnson joined the Bears midway through the 2025 campaign. Despite arriving late, he made an impact. He recorded 35 solo tackles, three sacks, two interceptions, and four pass breakups across 10 regular-season games. He also added a defended pass during the playoff divisional game against the Los Angeles Rams.However, Chicago may only be a brief stop on his career path. The safety already spoke openly about his long-term plans earlier this offseason. During a livestream on February 23, Gardner-Johnson discussed his career timeline and hinted that football may not remain his focus forever.“I’m retiring in four years,” Gardner-Johnson said during the livestream. “Win another Super Bowl. Make some money. Turn another city up, and I’m out.”He also pointed to the financial security he already built. Gardner-Johnson explained that he signed three major contracts in his career, including his rookie deal, a $10 million contract, and a $30 million deal. According to Spotrac contract estimates, the veteran defensive back has earned about $29.2 million across his NFL career.Interestingly, rumors have already linked him with a possible return to the Philadelphia Eagles, the franchise where he won a Super Bowl during the 2024 season.For now, the message remains just a post. Still, with free agency closing in, one short line from CJ Gardner-Johnson has suddenly turned the spotlight back on his future with the Chicago Bears.
Article Summary: C.J. Gardner-Johnson posted a cryptic message on X. His short line quickly caught attention across the league. With the NFL free agency window approaching, fans and insiders started reading between the lines. The safety already spoke openly about his long-term plans earlier this offseason.

Article Title: Travis Kelce Retirement: NFL Rumors: Insider says Travis Kelce is set for his 14th NFL season, but may leave the Kansas City Chiefs amid retirement talks
Article Text:
Insider says Travis Kelce is set for his 14th NFL season, but may leave the Kansas City Chiefs amid retirement talks

Travis Kelce's return is likely, but the Chiefs' future remains uncertain

The future of Travis Kelce is no longer tied only to the Kansas City Chiefs. The star tight end is expected to return for a 14th NFL season in 2026. However, league insiders say there is a real chance he could suit up for a different team.According to reporting from Dianna Russini and Jesse Newell of The Athletic, Kelce’s representatives plan to speak with multiple teams once free agency discussions move forward. That twist makes the Travis Kelce Chiefs return far from certain.Travis Kelce has spent his entire career with Kansas City since the franchise drafted him in the third round of the 2013 NFL Draft. For years, many around the league assumed he would either retire or finish his career with the Chiefs.That assumption changed this offseason.The biggest reason is simple. The star-TE is not under contract for the 2026 season and will become an unrestricted free agent.Chiefs general manager Brett Veach addressed the situation during media availability at the 2026 NFL Scouting Combine in Indianapolis on February 24. Veach said the organization prepared for both possibilities.“We’ve kind of prepared for either scenario (retire or come back),” Veach said at the combine.“Coach Andy Reid mentioned he’d had great dialogue with Travis on our end. Myself and Chris Shea have had some good dialogue with his group. Hopefully, he comes back, and we’ll let the process play out.”Kansas City also faces salary cap pressure this offseason. The team handed out several long-term extensions to stars in recent years, which limits its flexibility in free agency. That financial situation already forced the Chiefs to trade Trey Smith to the Los Angeles Rams for draft picks earlier this month.Kelce, who turns 37 in October, still produced at a high level in 2025. He finished the season with 851 receiving yards, ranking fourth among NFL tight ends. Data from Pro Football Focus also showed he forced nine missed tackles, three times more than he managed in 2024.Even so, the topic of Kelce's retirement continues to follow him. The veteran has played 13 seasons and built one of the greatest tight-end careers. His peak included a record 1,416 receiving yards in 2020 and seven straight 1,000-yard seasons between 2016 and 2022 with quarterback Patrick Mahomes.For now, Kelce plans to play again. The bigger question sits elsewhere. Will the Travis Kelce Chiefs return actually happen, or will one of the league’s most iconic players close his career in a different uniform?
Article Summary: Travis Kelce is expected to return for a 14th NFL season in 2026. The star tight end is not under contract for the 2026 season and will become an unrestricted free agent. Kelce's representatives plan to speak with multiple teams once free agency discussions move forward.

Article Title: Travis Hunter’s wife Leanna Lenee sends flirty message to Jaguars star: “Come in the room”
Article Text:
Travis Hunter, Leanna Lenee (Instagram)

Travis Hunter’s Instagram post with Leanna Lenee’s comment has fans talking



Travis Hunter does not appear to be rushing anything this offseason. The Jacksonville Jaguars two-way standout shared a relaxed glimpse of life away from football, and the internet quickly noticed. Hunter posted a series of photos on Instagram featuring himself in a white T-shirt and camo pants, standing beside a sleek black cargo van and his imposing yet calm Cane Corso. Within an hour, the carousel had already collected nearly 40,000 likes.The photos carried a quiet confidence. Hunter looked comfortable, smiling beside the dog that has become a familiar presence in his recent posts. His caption kept things simple.“Ocean ⛓️‍💥”, hunter captioned his post. While fans filled the comment section with praise and emojis, one message quickly rose above the rest. It came from his wife, Leanna Lenee, who added a playful line that instantly grabbed attention.The biggest buzz around Travis Hunter’s latest post did not come from the photos themselves. It came from Leanna Lenee’s teasing reaction. As fans scrolled through the comment section, they spotted her flirty response beneath the pictures.“😍😍come in the room”, Leanna commented on hunter’s postThe remark quickly gained traction. Within minutes, it picked up close to 200 likes and drew plenty of replies from fans who enjoyed the couple’s lighthearted dynamic. For those who follow Hunter online, the exchange felt familiar. Leanna frequently appears in his posts and is known for openly cheering him on or leaving playful comments that fans quickly notice.Their social media presence often shows a relaxed and supportive side of the couple. Whether it is celebrating milestones or simply sharing small moments, the two seem comfortable letting fans see pieces of their life together.Hunter’s dog also played a quiet role in the story behind the photos. The Cane Corso featured in the images was not a random addition to his offseason routine. The dog came into his life earlier this year as a special gift from Leanna.Back in February, she surprised him with a puppy for Valentine’s Day. A clip posted online documented the entire moment, showing how she planned the surprise and eventually introduced Hunter to the new member of the family. When the 12 week old puppy finally appeared, Hunter’s reaction said everything. He looked stunned at first, then broke into a wide smile as he realized what she had done.That same dog now appears beside him in the latest Instagram photos, turning a simple offseason post into a small reminder of a thoughtful moment between the couple.

Article Title: Olivia Ponton’s cryptic message fuels speculation after Joe Burrow is seen beaming alongside Jessica Alba at Las Vegas casino
Article Text:
Olivia Ponton, Joe Burrow, Jessica Alba (Getty Images)

Why Joe Burrow and Jessica Alba’s Las Vegas outing is drawing attention now



Olivia Ponton (Instagram)

The buzz around Joe Burrow rarely stays confined to the football field, and this week the Cincinnati quarterback found himself trending for reasons far removed from the playbook. Burrow, the face of the Cincinnati Bengals since arriving from LSU in the 2020 NFL Draft, was recently spotted sharing a relaxed late-night moment in Las Vegas with Hollywood actor Jessica Alba . A widely circulated photo shows the pair laughing together at a blackjack table early Sunday morning, quickly fueling curiosity across both sports and entertainment circles.Their appearance came after a busy night on the Las Vegas social scene. Both attended the launch party for Zero Bond at Wynn Las Vegas and later turned up at UFC 326. Hours later, they were seen again, still dressed in the same outfits from the evening’s events, chatting casually and sipping tea while playing cards. The moment felt unguarded and easy, though the internet quickly turned it into a headline. Meanwhile, Olivia Ponton's old post resurfaces.The sighting arrives during a transitional stretch for both public figures. Alba, now 44, finalized her divorce from film producer Cash Warren in February 2026 after nearly two decades together. Their separation had quietly unfolded since late 2024, leaving the Hollywood star largely out of the spotlight in recent months. Her Las Vegas outing marked one of the first high-profile social appearances since the divorce became official.Alba’s past relationships have often drawn attention. Over the years she has been linked to figures such as Mark Wahlberg and former MLB star Derek Jeter. More recently she made headlines again when she appeared as a guest dancer during Bad Bunny’s halftime performance at the Super Bowl, where her corset and denim look quickly went viral online.Burrow, meanwhile, is navigating his own personal reset during the NFL offseason. The quarterback was recently linked to model and influencer Olivia Ponton, a Sports Illustrated Swimsuit model whose name surfaced frequently alongside his throughout the winter. Their rumored relationship appeared casual from the start. Sources previously said they had been “hooking up since fall,” while sightings together at events like the Miami F1 Grand Prix and Met Gala after-parties kept speculation alive.The tone shifted in late February. Ponton posted a cryptic message on February 24, writing that life was “an escape from reality.” The post quickly drew attention from fans who had been following the rumored relationship. Around the same time, Burrow was seen socializing at Super Bowl week events without Ponton, and chatter about his dating life intensified.In the weeks since, Ponton’s social media activity has suggested a quieter focus. She recently posted about watching Game of Thrones during downtime, while fans online continued speculating about Burrow’s next chapter. Some even floated the idea of him dating Kendall Jenner before the Las Vegas photo with Alba surfaced.Away from the off-field intrigue, Burrow’s primary focus will soon return to football. Free agency is approaching, and Cincinnati faces difficult roster decisions, including uncertainty around pass rusher Trey Hendrickson. Still, the quarterback’s brief Las Vegas cameo proved something else. Even during the quiet months of the NFL calendar, Burrow remains firmly in the spotlight.
Article Summary: Cincinnati Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow was spotted with Jessica Alba in Las Vegas. The pair were seen playing cards at a blackjack table early Sunday morning. The sighting comes during a transitional stretch for both public figures. Burrow has been linked to Sports Illustrated Swimsuit model Olivia Ponton.

Article Title: Dak Prescott relationship drama grows as Sarah Jane Ramos posts subtle yet telling message amid reports wedding was called off
Article Text:
Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos (Imagn Images)

Dak Prescott wedding rumors grow after Sarah Jane Ramos’ Bahamas post resurfaces



Reports surrounding Dak Prescott began swirling late last week, and they quickly turned personal. The Dallas Cowboys quarterback found himself at the center of unexpected attention after claims surfaced that his planned wedding to fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos may have been called off. What started as a quiet offseason quickly shifted into a conversation about their relationship and what may have gone wrong behind the scenes.The first report came from TMZ on March 7, suggesting the couple had been dealing with tension for months. According to the report, matters reached a breaking point during their joint bachelor and bachelorette celebrations in the Bahamas. The outlet claimed a heated argument took place during the trip, leading Ramos to cancel the wedding.While neither Prescott nor Ramos has publicly addressed the claim, activity on social media soon added another layer to the speculation.The Dak Prescott wedding rumors gained momentum after Ramos shared a post on Instagram on March 6 that appeared connected to the Bahamas trip. The post showed her celebrating with friends on boats and along the beach, a typical bachelorette setting filled with smiles and group photos.But it was the caption that caught attention."I truly believe you can get through anything in life as long as you have really great friends. I love these girls so much ❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥".The message struck many as emotional, especially as rumors about the couple’s relationship were beginning to circulate. Some readers interpreted the words as a hint that Ramos might be leaning on close friends during a difficult moment.Another detail deepened the intrigue. The post was briefly removed from her profile before reappearing Saturday afternoon, something followers quickly noticed. Whether the removal meant anything or was simply a routine social media decision remains unclear.Prescott and Ramos’ relationship had moved quickly since it began in the fall of 2023. By October 2024, Prescott had proposed during a moment on a golf course that friends described as intimate and thoughtful. Long before that engagement, the two had already begun building a family together.Their first daughter, MJ, arrived in February 2024. A second daughter, Aurora, followed in May 2025. The couple often shared glimpses of family life, presenting an image that felt steady and joyful.For now, the situation remains uncertain. Neither Prescott nor Ramos has confirmed the reports or addressed the speculation directly. Until either of them speaks publicly, much of the conversation continues to rely on fragments of reporting and small signals online.Still, the story has drawn attention because it involves more than a celebrity relationship. Prescott and Ramos share two young daughters and a life that has grown quickly over the past two years. Whatever comes next, their personal decisions will likely unfold far from the noise that currently surrounds them.
Article Summary: Dak Prescott's planned wedding to Sarah Jane Ramos may have been called off. TMZ claimed a heated argument took place during their joint bachelor and bachelorette celebrations in the Bahamas. Ramos shared a post on Instagram on March 6 that appeared connected to the Bahamas trip.

Las Vegas sighting fuels speculation about Joe Burrow and Jessica Alba

Report claims Meghan Markle tried to connect with Taylor Swift

Rumors surrounding a possible wedding between Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce stirred widespread chatter in late 2025. As speculation about the guest list began circulating, another unexpected storyline appeared online. Reports suggested that Meghan Markle was interested in securing an invitation to the highly talked about event. However, insiders claimed that the path to Swift’s inner circle was not as simple as Markle may have hoped.At the center of the discussion was Prince Harry. One of the most visible efforts came when Markle promoted her lifestyle brand “As Ever” in a video that featured Swift’s song “Opalite.” Observers believed the move could have been a friendly gesture aimed at catching the singer’s attention.Despite the effort, the reported connection never materialized. Later, during her Eras Tour stop in the city, Swift posed for photos with William and his children, Prince George and Princess Charlotte, during a backstage meeting.Meanwhile, Prince Harry unintentionally added another layer to the discussion during a podcast appearance with comedian Hasan Minhaj. When the host asked him about Swift and a rumored feud involving pop singer Charli XCX , the Duke appeared surprised by the topic.He responded, “The what?…Oh no,”The brief reaction left many listeners with the impression that Harry prefers to stay away from conversations about Swift and pop culture in general.At the time, reports suggested Markle was still eager to connect with major entertainment figures. Whether those attempts would eventually succeed remained uncertain. What the situation showed, though, was the strange mix of pop culture, celebrity influence, and royal ties that often makes headlines around the world.
Article Summary: Report claims Meghan Markle tried to connect with Taylor Swift in 2025. Prince Harry was unable to help facilitate a connection between his wife and the global pop superstar. Swift is believed to share a closer relationship with Prince William. Markle’s past attempt to invite Swift to her podcast was also declined.

Article Title: “Girls are very distracting”: Heisman winner Fernando Mendoza sparks heated debate with comments about girlfriends
Article Text:
Indiana quarterback Fernando Mendoza went viral after revealing why he stays single despite his rising fame. The 2025 Heisman Trophy winner said he avoids having a girlfriend because relationships could distract him from studying film and focusing on football. LSU head coach Lane Kiffin reacted to the comment with clapping emojis, sparking debate among college football fans online.

Fernando Mendoza’s blunt take on girlfriends goes viral after national championship win

College football’s newest superstar is making headlines both on and off the field. Fernando Mendoza capped off a historic season by leading the Indiana Hoosiers football to a perfect 16–0 record and a national championship victory over the Miami Hurricanes football. The unbeaten campaign included a Big Ten title win against the Ohio State Buckeyes football and solidified Mendoza’s place among the most talked about players in college football.While fans celebrated his on-field brilliance, a simple comment about his personal life sparked another conversation online. Mendoza, who also captured the Heisman Trophy in 2025, revealed that staying single has been part of his focus during the season.His reasoning quickly went viral among fans and coaches across the sport.After Indiana secured a 27–21 national championship win, Mendoza explained why football currently takes priority over relationships. The quarterback made it clear that his intense preparation leaves little room for distractions.“I don’t have time for a girlfriend. Girls are very distracting. If I have one, I’d give her my all— hanging out, instead of watching extra film,” the Hoosiers quarterback said.The statement caught the attention of newly appointed Lane Kiffin, who recently moved from Ole Miss Rebels football to lead the LSU Tigers football. Kiffin responded to the remark on social media with a brief but noticeable reaction, "👏”The message was short, yet fans quickly began debating what the coach meant by it.Some interpreted the reaction as praise for Mendoza’s dedication to the game.Others believed it could be a subtle reminder to players about maintaining focus during the season.The situation carries an interesting twist. Kiffin’s own daughter, Landry Kiffin, is currently in a public relationship with LSU linebacker Whit Weeks. Their relationship became widely known earlier in the season before a matchup involving Kiffin’s former team at Ole Miss.Beyond the dating discussion, Mendoza’s achievements remain the bigger story. His undefeated season placed him in rare company alongside quarterbacks like Joe Burrow who finished a championship season without a single loss during the College Football Playoff era.Just days after winning the national title, Mendoza shared reflections on his journey through a LinkedIn post. He spoke about the importance of belief, risk taking, and gratitude toward teammates, coaches, and mentors who helped shape the historic run.For now, the quarterback’s priorities remain clear. Championships first. Everything else can wait.
Article Summary: Fernando Mendoza led the Indiana Hoosiers football to a perfect 16–0 record and a national championship victory. The 2025 Heisman Trophy winner said he avoids having a girlfriend because relationships could distract him from studying film and focusing on football. LSU head coach Lane Kiffin reacted to the comment with clapping emojis, sparking debate among college football fans online.

Article Title: Fact check: Did Cardi B cheat on Offset with NFL star Stefon Diggs? Viral claim examined
Article Text:
A viral social media post has sparked rumors claiming NFL star Stefon Diggs secretly had a relationship with Cardi B while she was still married to Offset. The post quickly spread online, fueling speculation among fans. However, there is no confirmed evidence supporting the claim, and none of the people involved have publicly addressed the rumor.

Viral social media claim fuels speculation about Cardi B and Stefon Diggs

Fresh rumors surrounding Stefon Diggs and Cardi B have started circulating online after a viral social media post made bold claims about their past connection. The allegation quickly spread across platforms, pulling in fans of both the NFL star and the Grammy winning rapper. As often happens in celebrity culture, speculation moved fast. Yet there is still no verified confirmation supporting the claims that surfaced in the post.The talk also brought up Cardi B's past relationship with Offset again. Their rocky marriage was often on display in public through social media and interviews. Because of that history, any new rumor about their relationship tends to spread quickly online. But the claims that are going around now have not been proven true and should be seen as speculation rather than fact.The rumor gained attention after a post shared on social platform X presented a dramatic version of events involving the rapper and the NFL receiver. The post claimed that Diggs and Cardi B had been secretly involved during a period when Cardi B was still married to Offset. It also suggested that the alleged relationship happened while she was expecting a child with Offset.The viral post read: “🚨 Breaking news 💔😳 Stefon Diggs sl£pt with Cardi B while she was still married to Offset and pr£gnant with Offset’s child 🤦‍♀️For a long time, Cardi B had been accusing Offset of cheating on her on Twitter and during Instagram Live sessions.But later, Offset allegedly found out that Cardi had also been seeing his close friend, Stefon Diggs.Diggs used to visit their home often.He would bring things like popcorn and pizza for Offset’s kids and act like a friendly “uncle.”Meanwhile, he was secretly involved with Cardi behind Offset’s back.One time, Diggs reportedly came to the house when Cardi was the only person there, and that’s when they allegedly hooked up.Before their public breakup, Offset once commented during an Instagram Live that Cardi had cheated on him while she was pregnant.Cardi later confirmed this claim herself on Twitter.Unbelievable! 💔”Even though the claim is very detailed, there is no reliable proof that it is true at this time. Cardi B, Offset, and Stefon Diggs have all denied the rumor in public.In the world of celebrity gossip, this isn't unusual.Viral posts often mix bits of old controversies with guesses, which can make stories that haven't been proven seem true.In reality, a lot of these claims don't hold up when the facts are looked at.For now, the supposed link between Diggs and Cardi B is still just that.A rumor going around on social media that hasn't been confirmed by any trustworthy source. People should be careful about believing the story until one of the people involved responds or new evidence comes to light.
Article Summary: Viral social media post claims NFL star Stefon Diggs secretly had a relationship with Cardi B while she was still married to Offset. The post quickly spread online, fueling speculation among fans. There is no confirmed evidence supporting the claim, and none of the people involved have publicly addressed the rumor.

Article Title: Fact check: Was a "rock solid" prenup the reason behind Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos' rumored split?

Did Dak Prescott ask fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos to sign a rock solid prenup before their rumored split?(Image via Getty Images)

Has Dak Prescott pushed Sarah Jane Ramos to sign a strong prenup before they tie the knot?

Sarah Jane Ramos has been a strong supporter of Dak Prescott

Dak Prescott, the Dallas Cowboys’ star player, and his fiancee, Sarah Jane Ramos, have reportedly went their separate ways, just a month before they were supposed to finally tie the knot.While neither of the two has broken their silences on it, there have been strong speculations that the two ended things because Dak Prescott wanted Sarah Jane Ramos to sign a prenup before they got married.A few hours ago, a page on X claimed that the Dallas Cowboys’ star player, Dak Prescott, “spent the last few months pushing hard for a rock-solid prenup to protect his new bag, and she flat-out refused to sign it.”This rumor sparked panic among fans as many fans were convinced by it.But the rumor is entirely false and the story seems completely fabricated. No insider has claimed or reported that the alleged split between Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos happened because he wanted her to sign a prenuptial agreement before they tied the knot.A few hours ago, as per TMZ Sports, an insider revealed that their relationship “had been rocky behind the scenes for months…”The source added, “But things came to a head with a blowup argument at their joint bachelor and bachelorette parties in the Bahamas — and Sarah Jane called it off.”The source continued, “We’re told the relationship is beyond repair … so the focus will be on coparenting their two kids — ages 2 and nearly 10 months — moving forward.”With just weeks away from their lavish wedding, Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos are getting brutally trolled by fans.However, neither the Dallas Cowboys’ star player, Dak Prescott, nor the mother of his children, Sarah Jane Ramos, has responded to the rumors about their break up yet.Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos are parents to two young girls, with their youngest one being born just a few months ago.The two met in 2023 and soon fell in love and welcomed their first child. In 2024, Dak Prescott popped the big question to her and they went public with their engagement.Over the last few years, Sarah Jane Ramos has been a pretty strong source of support and strength to the star player, Dak Prescott, as she even stood by his side as he went through surgery in 2024.

Article Title: “She's born a biological man”: Travis Kelce's fiancé Taylor Swift dragged into controversy after psychic’s viral podcast claims
Article Text:
Psychic Denea sparked controversy after making shocking claims about Taylor Swift on the Digital Social Hour Podcast. She alleged that Swift’s concerts involve rituals and “energy harvesting,” comments that quickly went viral online. The remarks drew strong backlash from fans and critics, many of whom dismissed the claims as baseless conspiracy theories about the global pop superstar.

Psychic’s controversial podcast comments about Taylor Swift spark debate online

After a psychic's comments from a podcast appearance went viral on social media, people started arguing about Taylor Swift , the global pop star and Travis Kelce 's fiancée. The comments, which were made during an episode of Sean Kelly's Digital Social Hour Podcast, got a lot of attention from both fans and critics right away.The talk got more heated because Swift is still one of the most important artists in modern music. She is still in the news all the time because she has record-breaking tours, a huge global fan base, and a business empire built around her brand. Because of this, any claim that has to do with her name spreads quickly on the internet, where fans and critics often disagree about the stories that surround the superstar.During the podcast conversation, psychic and spiritual personality Denea shared a series of dramatic claims about Swift’s concerts and public image.Her remarks quickly caught attention because of their unusual nature and the scale of the accusations she presented during the discussion.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Denea said, "One of the biggest pop stars in the world, probably one of the wealthiest singers, she's born a biological man. And when you take your children to these concerts, you're a part of a ritual, and there is spell work being done through her lyrics."She added, "Stop taking your kids to these concerts, these festivals that look, you know, sunshine and rainbows. There's really dark layers to them, and they're also energy harvesting places. All that loud bass, the screaming, the stomping, it actually calls in these bottom feeders from the dimensions to feed off of you."The comments started a lot of talk on social media right away. Some people said the statements were false and misleading, while others shared clips of the podcast that quickly spread across the internet.For almost twenty years, Swift has been one of the most successful singers in the music business. She has had to deal with a lot of rumors and conspiracy theories during that time. Fans and mainstream commentators still don't believe anything the podcast says because there isn't any credible proof to back it up.Still, the event shows how quickly rumors about famous people can spread online. Podcasts, clips, and viral posts spread like crazy these days. Even strange comments can start conversations all over the world.But for the millions of people who follow Swift, her music and performances are still the most important things. She is one of the most important artists of her time because she keeps breaking records and filling stadiums all over the world.
Article Summary: Psychic Denea alleged that Swift’s concerts involve rituals and “energy harvesting,” comments that quickly went viral online. The remarks drew strong backlash from fans and critics, many of whom dismissed the claims as baseless conspiracy theories.

Cardi B opens up about the emotional toll of a messy split in her life amid her breakup with Stefon Diggs.(Image via Getty Images)

Cardi B shares her pain as she split from Offset and fell in love with Stefon Diggs



What allegedly happened between Stefon Diggs and Cardi B?



Stefon Diggs, the former New England Patriots’ popular wide receiver, has been in the news for his controversial high profile break up with the popular Grammy winner, Cardi B.While Cardi B and Stefon Diggs have stayed silent about their much talked about break up, the two have stayed silent about this. Amid all the mess, Cardi B’s confession on the pain she felt has resurfaced.A few months ago, the popular rapper appeared on a podcast where she shared the pain and betrayal she felt when she realised it was better to end her controversial marriage to her ex husband, the “Migos” rapper, Offset.Cardi B said, “I told myself ‘I’m pregnant. I’m going to accept my flaws that I bring in this marriage and I’m going to apologize for it and I’m going to work on it…”The popular Grammy winner continued. “When I take accountability and you take advantage of me taking accountability, and you take that as a, ‘see, I knew she’d be back,’ and you’re taking advantage of that, it really just killed everything.”The “Am I the Drama?” artist added, “I feel like I live in a power…It took some crying and some scary thoughts, but I’m here.”In the same interview, Cardi B had explained how “strong” and “at peace” she feels in her life, especially after she ended her marriage with Offset and fell deeply in love with the popular wide receiver, Stefon Diggs.Unfortunately, as luck would have it, Cardi B and Stefon Diggs’ high profile and pretty controversial relationship came to a pretty dramatic end last month, just hours before Super Bowl LX.While the actual reason behind their controversial break up has not been confirmed yet, many insiders have revealed that it has to do with Stefon Diggs’ alleged infidelity.Throughout the last year that Stefon Diggs and Cardi B turned heads with their high profile romance, many women have accused the star player of fathering a child with them.So much so, when Cardi B was expecting a child with Stefon Diggs, he was involved in a paternity lawsuit with an ex girlfriend.As per reports, Stefon Diggs had more than three children last year while he actively dated Cardi B in public.However, neither Cardi B nor Stefon Diggs has commented on the cheating rumors yet.
